data.title: CRV price at $0.52 as US sets up Bitcoin reserve, boosting crypto sentiment but technicals advise caution.
data.description: Curve (CRV) is currently being traded at a price of $0.52 in the cryptocurrency market. This price surge is attributed to an overall positive sentiment in the market post the US government's creation of a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. However, analysts are advising caution despite this optimism due to technical indicators.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics granted 62,790 shares of stock options to 9 new employees on Oct 16, 2025.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Iovance Biotherapeutics, located in San Carlos, California, disclosed the approval of granting inducement stock options to nine new non-executive employees. These stock options cover a total of 62,790 shares of the company's common stock. Iovance Biotherapeutics, a biotechnology firm specializing in developing innovative polyclonal tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (“TIL”) therapies for cancer patients, operates under the NASDAQ symbol IOVA.

data.title: FlexShopper, Inc. received a delisting notification from Nasdaq due to not filing necessary reports by the deadline.
data.description: FlexShopper, Inc. announced on Oct. 17, 2025, that it received a notice from Nasdaq on Oct. 14, 2025, about initiating the delisting process for its common stock (Nasdaq: FPAY). Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications Department stated that the delisting is due to FlexShopper's failure to file its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the period ended Dec. 31, 2024, and its Quarterly Reports on Form 10-Q for the periods ended March 31, 2025, and June 30, 2025, by the final deadline of Oct. 13, 2025, as required by Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1).
Morningstar DBRS Upgrades Republic of Italy to Low, Trend Changed to Stable
Morningstar DBRS confirmed Italy’s short-term foreign and local currency issuer ratings at R-1.

data.title: FDA approves Novo Nordisk's oral semaglutide for CV risk reduction in high-risk adults with type 2 diabetes. Rybelsus tablets 7mg or 14mg indicated to reduce risk of MACE such as CV death, heart attack, or stroke.
data.description: The FDA has approved Rybelsus® (semaglutide) tablets in 7 mg or 14 mg doses as the only oral GLP-1 medicine for reducing the risk of major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE) in adults with type 2 diabetes at high risk. This medication is proven to lower the chances of CV death, heart attack, or stroke.

data.title: Key Ethereum Foundation researcher Dankrad Feist joins Stripe's Tempo team, citing shared values and synergy.
data.description: A prominent researcher of the Ethereum Foundation, Feist, highlighted the convergence of values between Tempo and Ethereum, noting that the two entities complement each other effectively.

data.title: TEZSPIRE approved in US for chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps for patients aged 12+, targets TSLP.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, AstraZeneca and Amgen have announced that TEZSPIRE® (tezepelumab -ekko) has received approval in the United States for use as an add-on maintenance treatment for adult and pediatric patients aged 12 years and older with inadequately controlled chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps (CRSwNP). This condition is a complex epithelial-driven inflammatory issue. TEZSPIRE is notable for being the first and only biologic that specifically targets thymic stromal lymphopoietin (TSLP) to receive approval for CRSwNP. The approval was granted by the US Food and Drug Administration.

data.title: Veteran strategist Ed Yardeni predicts gold may hit $10,000 per ounce by end of the decade, surpassing Bitcoin amidst a surging gold market in 2025.
data.description: Veteran Wall Street strategist Ed Yardeni has forecasted that gold may reach $10,000 per ounce by the end of the decade or sooner, citing it as the "physical bitcoin" amidst an unstable world. This prediction contrasts with Bitcoin's performance, as gold has surged over 60% in 2025 compared to Bitcoin's 20% gain. Yardeni's year-end target of $4,000 per ounce has already been surpassed, leading him to predict $5,000 gold by 2026 and potentially $10,000 by 2030. This trend highlights gold's emergence as a preferred asset in a world marked by de-dollarization and trade upheaval. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: TONCoin tests critical support at $2.14 amid 0.9% drop in broader crypto market due to US inflation data, suggesting oversold levels.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Toncoin is currently valued at $2.14, experiencing a 0.9% decrease amidst a larger decline in the crypto market due to the release of US inflation data exceeding expectations. Technical indicators suggest that the market may be oversold.

data.title: ALLO Communications launches Smart Schools program with Calix SmartTown for Education, providing secure Wi-Fi for LPS students. $CALX.
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska and San Jose, California, Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) revealed that ALLO Communications has introduced Smart Schools, a new program based on Calix SmartTown® for Education and seamlessly linked with the Calix Broadband Platform. This initiative will deliver secure community Wi-Fi for students in grades 6-12 in Lincoln Public Schools who choose to participate. By opting in, these students can access safe internet connectivity, promoting digital equality and expanding educational opportunities outside of school. ALLO Communications' deployment of this program showcases its commitment to leveraging Calix technology for the benefit of the community.

data.title: Sensient Tech to hold earnings call on Oct 31, 2025, at 8:30 am CDT to discuss Q3 results. Investors can join via webcast or phone. Replay available.
data.description: Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT) is set to host an earnings call and webcast discussing its 2025 third quarter results on October 31, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. CDT. Investors can tune into the live webcast through the Company’s website at investor.sensient.com. Alternatively, they can participate in the conference call by reaching out to Chorus Call Inc. at (844) 492-3726 or (412) 317-1078. Following the call, a replay of the webcast will be accessible on the Company’s website.

data.title: The Chequit in Shelter Island Heights to close for winter from Nov 2, 2025, to reopen in April 2026, following seasonal trends.
data.description: In Shelter Island Heights, NY, The Chequit at 23 Grand Avenue will shut down for the winter on November 2, 2025, and plans to reopen in April 2026. The decision to close during the off-season is in line with the typical travel patterns of the East End. The closure period allows the property to prepare for the return of guests and provides them with the opportunity to enjoy the location at its best. The Soloviev Group manages The Chequit and made the announcement, emphasizing the seasonal nature of travel in the area.

data.title: AlphaGen Intelligence Corp. concludes the LIFE offering with a successful closure.
data.description: Last month, a new report revealed that the global unemployment rate reached 6.7%, affecting a total of 218 million people. The report highlighted that the COVID-19 pandemic continues to have a significant impact on job markets worldwide, with youth unemployment being particularly high at 13.1%. Additionally, the report indicated that the income loss for workers during the pandemic was estimated at 8.8% globally, equivalent to $3.7 trillion. These figures underscore the ongoing challenges faced by economies and labor markets as they strive to recover from the effects of the health crisis.

data.title: CASEKOO introduces 'Tribute to Artists' series at West Bund Museum Art Store in Shanghai. Tech meets art world.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, in Los Angeles, CASEKOO, a leading tech accessories brand, revealed its entrance into the art world with the introduction of the "Tribute to Artists" series at the West Bund Museum Art Store in Shanghai, China. This exclusive collection signifies a significant move for the company into a new market segment.

data.title: Citius Pharmaceuticals & Citius Oncology to participate in October 2025 conferences: LD Micro Main Event XIX, Maxim Growth Summit, and Think Equity Conference.
data.description: From October 19th to 21st, 2025, LD Micro Main Event XIX will take place, followed by the 2025 Maxim Growth Summit on October 22nd and 23rd. Additionally, The Think Equity Conference is scheduled for October 30th, 2025. CRANFORD, N.J., Oct. 17, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Citius Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and Citius Oncology, Inc., traded under Nasdaq as CTXR and CTOR respectively, shared an important announcement today.
